CVE-2025-5918.title: A vulnerability has been identified in the libarchive library. Th ...
CVE-2025-5918.description: A vulnerability has been identified in the libarchive library. This flaw can be triggered when file streams are piped into bsdtar, potentially allowing for reading past the end of the file. This out-of-bounds read can lead to unintended consequences, including unpredictable program behavior, memory corruption, or a denial-of-service condition.

CVE-2025-60753.title: An issue was discovered in libarchive bsdtar before version 3.8.1 ...
CVE-2025-60753.description: An issue was discovered in libarchive bsdtar before version 3.8.1 in function apply_substitution in file tar/subst.c when processing crafted -s substitution rules. This can cause unbounded memory allocation and lead to denial of service (Out-of-Memory crash).
